mapper.sql: id, asset_id, dep_id, cdate, udate, transfer_code, asset_code, asset_name, asset_typeid, asset_typename, spe_model, orig_value, bedep_id, user_id, user_name, dep_name, bedep_name, status
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from asset_transfer
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into asset_transfer (id, asset_id, dep_id, cdate, udate, transfer_code, asset_code, asset_name, asset_typeid, asset_typename, spe_model, orig_value, bedep_id, user_id, user_name, dep_name, bedep_name, status ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bedepId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bedepName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into asset_transfer
id,
asset_id,
dep_id,
cdate,
udate,
transfer_code,
asset_code,
asset_name,
asset_typeid,
asset_typename,
spe_model,
orig_value,
bedep_id,
user_id,
user_name,
dep_name,
bedep_name,
status,

#{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},

mapper.update:
update asset_transfer
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_id = #{record.assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
transfer_code = #{record.transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_code = #{record.assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_name = #{record.assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_typeid = #{record.assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_typename = #{record.assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spe_model = #{record.speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orig_value = #{record.origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bedep_id = #{record.bedepId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_name = #{record.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bedep_name = #{record.bedepName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update asset_transfer set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_id = #{record.assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dep_id = #{record.depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cdate = #{record.cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{record.udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, transfer_code = #{record.transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_code = #{record.assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_name = #{record.assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_typeid = #{record.assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_typename = #{record.assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spe_model = #{record.speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orig_value = #{record.origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bedep_id = #{record.bedepId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{record.userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_name = #{record.depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bedep_name = #{record.bedepName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update asset_transfer
asset_id = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
transfer_code = #{transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_code = #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_name = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
asset_typeid = #{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
asset_typename = #{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
spe_model = #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
orig_value = #{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bedep_id = #{bedepId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dep_name = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bedep_name = #{bedepName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update asset_transfer set asset_id = #{assetId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dep_id = #{depId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cdate = #{cdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, udate = #{udate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, transfer_code = #{transferCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_code = #{assetCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_name = #{assetName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, asset_typeid = #{assetTypeid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, asset_typename = #{assetTypename,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, spe_model = #{speModel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, orig_value = #{origValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bedep_id = #{bedepId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_name = #{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dep_name = #{depName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bedep_name = #{bedepName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
